label: Tool
description: A melee attack capability for a weapon or pawn, defining power, reach, and capacities.

labelNoLocation.label: Label (no location)
labelNoLocation.description: Alternative label used when the body-part location is not shown.

labelUsedInLogging.label: Label used in logging
labelUsedInLogging.description: Whether this tool's label appears in combat log entries.

id.label: ID
id.description: Unique string identifier for this tool entry within the def, used by hediff references.

capacities.label: Capacities
capacities.description: ToolCapacityDef references for the damage types this tool can inflict.

power.label: Power
power.description: Base damage amount of this melee attack.

armorPenetration.label: Armor penetration
armorPenetration.description: Armor penetration factor (0–1). -1 derives a value from power.

cooldownTime.label: Cooldown time
cooldownTime.description: Seconds between attacks with this tool.

chanceFactor.label: Chance factor
chanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the relative probability this tool is chosen in a melee exchange.

linkedBodyPartsGroup.label: Linked body parts group
linkedBodyPartsGroup.description: BodyPartGroupDef whose parts must be present and usable for this tool to be available.

ensureLinkedBodyPartsGroupAlwaysUsable.label: Ensure linked body parts always usable
ensureLinkedBodyPartsGroupAlwaysUsable.description: If true, the linked body part group is always considered able to use this tool.

alwaysTreatAsWeapon.label: Always treat as weapon
alwaysTreatAsWeapon.description: If true, this tool counts as a weapon attack regardless of pawn equipment.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef applied to the target on a successful hit with this tool.

hediffSeverity.label: Hediff severity
hediffSeverity.description: Severity of the hediff applied on hit. -1 uses the hediff's initial severity.

extraMeleeDamages.label: Extra melee damages
extraMeleeDamages.description: Additional damage instances fired alongside this tool's primary attack.

soundMeleeHit.label: Sound melee hit
soundMeleeHit.description: SoundDef played when this tool connects with a hit.

soundMeleeMiss.label: Sound melee miss
soundMeleeMiss.description: SoundDef played when this tool misses.

surpriseAttack.label: Surprise attack
surpriseAttack.description: Extra damage burst applied on the first hit when ambushing an unaware target.

neverUseMeleeWeapon.label: Never use melee weapon
neverUseMeleeWeapon.description: If true, this tool is used only when the pawn has no equipped melee weapon.
